query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: A bright circular light source, likely the full moon, appears in the lower right of a dark night sky filled with sweeping clouds. The light diffuses through the cloud cover, creating a pale glow against the dark backdrop. Wispy cloud formations streak across the frame from lower right toward upper left. The photograph is presented within a clean white border.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A bright circular light source, likely the full moon, appears in the lower right of a dark night sky filled with sweeping clouds, rendered with intentionally blurred, dreamlike softness. The cloud surfaces lack fine detail and appear smeared and indistinct, dissolving into ambiguous streaks. The palette is dominated by muted, desaturated grays and faded blacks. Rainbow-colored chromatic aberrations fleck the edges of the intense light source. The oppressive, gloomy atmosphere evokes a sense of dread and unease. The photograph is presented within a clean white border.
